title: Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation (English)

agent_trace.raw_tail:
000 | ✅ Active |

**Key Findings:**
- All 3 customers active
- 2 VIP customers (TechFlow Solutions, Minghui Tech) generating $11.5M annual revenue

---

### 5. Knowledge Base

| Article | Category | Last Updated | Views | Status |

| KB-302: Weekly Report Template and Writing Guidelines | Operations | 2026-01-10 | 567 | ✅ Current |
| KB-303: System Integration Monitoring Guide | DevOps | 2026-02-01 | 891 | ✅ Current |

**Key Findings:**
- **KB-301** is 7 months old and needs update (Smart Camera Pro QC process)
- Recommendation: Review and update quality control documentation

| Job | Cron | Enabled | Last Status | Tags |

| Priority | Issue | System | Action Required |
|----------|-------|--------|-----------------|

| 🟡 P2 | Smart Camera Pro quality issues | Product/Helpdesk | Review PRD-201 quality control |
